sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_basic_msg_t (basicName,validflag,basicType,parentid,addoperator,addtime,memo,sort) VALUES ('$basicName$',$validflag$,$basicType$,$parentid$,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',$sort$) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.update: UPDATE sys_basic_msg_t SET validflag = 0 WHERE id = $id$

UPDATE sys_basic_msg_t SET basicName = '$basicName$',memo='$memo$',sort=$sort$
parentid = $parentid$
WHERE id = $id$
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0
basicType = $basicType$
validflag = $validflag$
(basicName like '%$basicName$%')

SELECT b1.*,b2.basicName AS parentName FROM sys_basic_msg_t b1 LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t b2 ON b1.parentid=b2.id WHERE b1.validflag > 0
b1.basicType = $basicType$
b1.validflag = $validflag$
(b1.basicName like '%$basicName$%')
ORDER BY b1.sort,b1.id
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND id = $id$
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND memo = '$memo$'

SELECT b.*,b2.basicName AS parentName FROM sys_basic_msg_t b LEFT JOIN sys_basic_msg_t b2 ON b.parentid=b2.id WHERE b.validflag > 0 and b.basicType=$basicType$ order by b.basicName='µ▒ēµŚÅ' desc,b.basicName='ń╗┤ÕÉŠÕ░öµŚÅ' desc,b.basicName='ÕōłĶÉ©ÕģŗµŚÅ' desc,b.basicName='µ¤»Õ░öÕģŗÕŁ£µŚÅ' desc,b.basicName='ĶÆÖÕÅżµŚÅ' desc,b.sort,b.id
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND basicType = $basicType$ and parentid=$parentid$ order by id
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 AND basicType = $basicType$ and basicName='$basicName$' order by id
SELECT * FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 and parentid > 0 and parentid=$parentid$ order by id
SELECT IFNULL(id,COUNT(id)) FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 and basicType=$basicType$ and basicName='$basicName$'
select id,basicName from sys_basic_msg_t where id in $idlist$

select a.id,concat(a.basicName,'(',b.basicName,')') as basicName from c_company_t c left join sys_basic_msg_t a on find_in_set(a.id,c.managetype) left join sys_basic_msg_t b on a.parentid = b.id where c.id = $id$ and a.parentid != 0 and a.validflag > 0
SELECT id,basicName FROM sys_basic_msg_t WHERE validflag > 0 and parentid > 0 and parentid in ( select id from sys_basic_msg_t where basicName in $basicNameList$ ) order by id
